_rationale.purpose: Parity proof for DART-MWm23vqgX9O6: `lci search --exclude PATTERN` (regex path filter) must mirror Go. Go's cmd/lci/search.go forwards excludePattern into SearchOptions; the display path regexp.MatchString-filters result paths. C++ post-filters the indexer's result rows with a pre-compiled std::regex (operating on N≤500 paths, not a hot path — Karpathy rule preserved: regex pre-compiled once, applied to bounded post-engine set).
_rationale.implementation: src/cli/search.cpp apply_path_filters() — pre-compiles exclude/include regex once, drops rows whose path matches exclude. Invalid regex syntax warns to stderr and skips the filter (matches Go's regexp.Compile error path).
_rationale.tier: stable: stdout matches Go after text_normalize.
